name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement

labels: enhancement

## Feature Description
[Clear and concise description of the feature]

## Problem / Use Case
**Current situation**: [What problem does this solve?]
**User need**: [Who needs this and why?]

## Proposed Solution
[Describe how you envision this feature working]

### Example Usage
```python
# Show example code or usage if applicable
result = new_feature(input_data)
```

## Alternative Solutions
[Describe any alternative approaches you've considered]

## Related Agent
[If applicable, specify which agent (1-9) this relates to]

## Implementation Notes
**Estimated complexity**: [Simple / Medium / Complex]
**Dependencies**: [Any deliverables or features this depends on]
**Breaking changes**: [Yes / No - explain if yes]

## Testing Considerations
- [ ] Unit tests needed
- [ ] Integration tests needed
- [ ] Manual testing required
- [ ] Lineage impact (if data transformation)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] [Criterion 1]
- [ ] [Criterion 2]
- [ ] [Criterion 3]

## Additional Context
[Any other information, mockups, diagrams, or references]

## Priority
- [ ] Critical (blocks major functionality)
- [ ] High (important for next release)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have soon)
- [ ] Low (future enhancement)
